summary: W852 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while routing the W732 one-provider route-data surface into W851. It uses W763 to project W732 route data back to W733 concrete leaves, case-splits the closed-map or closed-embedding closedness branch, rebuilds the matching W735 exact-input branch internally, and then applies the W851 comparison-selected-cochain stable route. The final original four-task witness is still absent because no concrete W732 route-data provider and no completion review packet have been constructed.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W852 reaches the existing selected-cochain stable package from one W732 route-data provider, but that provider is still an input rather than a constructed value.

The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing because no concrete W732 boundary/relation target/closedness normalized source/endpoint route-data provider has been constructed.
ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations still record nonterminal evidence and lack originalFourTaskContractCompletion.
The review packet still does not expose the immutable-contract negative fixtures and clean extraction audit in the completion packet shape required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct a concrete W732 boundary/relation target/closedness normalized source/endpoint route-data provider.
Expose a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness using the W852 route after the W732 provider is real.
Refresh the review packet fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
